name: 老道长
base_prompt: elderly taoist master, white long beard, thin build 165cm, wise deep-set eyes, wrinkled kind face

variants.calm: meditative pose, peaceful smile, eyes closed, holding whisk
variants.serious: stern expression, gripping staff, furrowed brow
variants.casting: arms raised, talisman floating, golden runes glowing, wind blowing robe
variants.dying: collapsed on ground, blood at corner of mouth, hand reaching out, fading glow

costume_default: gray taoist robe, cloth shoes, prayer beads on wrist
